title: euphrasia pectinata subsp. simplex
intro: Euphrasia pectinata subsp. simplex is a plant species that belongs to the genus Euphrasia, commonly known as the eyebright family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating eye infections and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Euphrasia pectinata subsp. simplex include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Euphrasia pectinata subsp. simplex can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
